privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated 'mobile-banking-app' project in OpenProject. It requires modifying two existing work packages: 'Fix transaction history pagination bug' and 'Security audit - JWT token expiration', which are explicitly initialized in the database. The agent must also create a new work package exactly named 'Emergency: Token invalidation on user logout' and a wiki page titled 'Incident Report - Transaction History', both of which are strictly evaluated by the verifier script.
